releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* build(deps): bump svelte from 3.46.4 to 3.55.1 by @dependabot in https://github.com/valentine195/obsidian-settings-search/pull/26
* build(deps): bump moment from 2.29.1 to 2.29.4 by @dependabot in https://github.com/valentine195/obsidian-settings-search/pull/25
* build(deps): bump json5 from 1.0.1 to 1.0.2 by @dependabot in https://github.com/valentine195/obsidian-settings-search/pull/23
* build(deps): bump terser from 5.10.0 to 5.14.2 by @dependabot in https://github.com/valentine195/obsidian-settings-search/pull/19
* build(deps): bump loader-utils from 1.4.0 to 1.4.2 by @dependabot in https://github.com/valentine195/obsidian-settings-search/pull/20
* fix: fixes issue with displaying external settings by @valentine195 in https://github.com/valentine195/obsidian-settings-search/pull/28

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/valentine195/obsidian-settings-search/compare/1.3.3...1.3.4
